name: Provenance chain

author.note: The neutral entry lens (design §3.1) — no collective's voice, only the recorded chain.

purpose: A neutral, dated ledger of what was recorded as happening: every operational event of this encounter in order, each entry showing its issuer, its pinned source commit and a payload excerpt; accepted obligations anchor as boxed clauses at the event that accepted them. No interpretation — assertions are excluded entirely (see declared_exclusions).

selection.notes: All 7 sourced operational events (design §3.1 'operational events only, all 7'); every object referenced by them; both obligations, anchored at their accepting event (object.admitted, evt-02).

declared_exclusions.reason: Interpretations are not provenance: all authored assertions (Ensemble's transformation claim and boundary-case refusal, Meridian's live framing) are excluded from this lens entirely. See ensemble-transformation-v1 / meridian-position-v1, or the compare view.

The editorial.encounter_assembled event (The Middle's own 2026-07-14 act of assembling this record) is not shown as a chain entry in v1 — the ledger renders the encounter's own operational history, not the apparatus that recorded it. Visible on /apparatus instead.
Declared blind spots (design §3.1): meaning, internal deliberation, anything outside the pinned commits.
